decisions.decision: Dispatch worktree executors sequentially with run_in_background:true
decisions.rationale: Parallel dispatch in a single message races on .git/config.lock

decisions.decision: Drop post-merge --amend of STATE.md/ROADMAP.md after worktree merge
decisions.rationale: Wave 1 merge script triggered a cwd-loss fault that rewound main; simple sequential merges without amend worked cleanly in Wave 2

next_action: Spawn gsd-executor for plan 05 (icy-disable-toggle) in a worktree, base HEAD=9188c9f. Then plan 06 (playing-timer) in wave 4.
context_notes: Waves 1 and 2 complete (4 plans merged into main). Main HEAD: 9188c9f. Plans 05 and 06 remaining. Wave 3: plan 05 alone (depends_on 04). Wave 4: plan 06 alone (depends_on 05). Auto-chain flag still active (workflow._auto_chain_active=true) so resume will auto-advance to verify after execution.
